mapper.sql: a.id AS "id", a.notice_title AS "noticeTitle", a.content_url AS "contentUrl", a.content AS "content", a.preview_content AS "previewContent", a.status AS "status", a.image_url AS "imageUrl", a.start_time AS "startTime", a.end_time AS "endTime", a.notice_type AS "noticeType", a.interval_number AS "intervalNumber", a.interval_unit AS "intervalUnit", a.number AS "number", a.force_popup AS "forcePopup", a.target_user_ids AS "targetUserIds", a.create_time AS "createTime", a.update_time AS "updateTime"
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_notification a WHERE a.id = #{id}
